description: Domain layer: Add getTree API method, PendingChange model, TreeChangeCompiler, and RepoTreeOrchestrator with tests
steps: 1. Add getTree method to GithubGitDataApi interface in domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/GithubGitDataApi.kt: suspend fun getTree(owner: String, repo: String, treeSha: String, recursive: Boolean = false): CreateTreeResponse. The return type CreateTreeResponse already has the right shape (sha, url, tree: List<TreeEntry>, truncated: Boolean).

2. Create domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/PendingChange.kt with: enum class PendingChangeType { MOVE, RENAME, DELETE, CREATE_FOLDER, UPLOAD }; data class PendingChange(val type: PendingChangeType, val sourcePath: String?, val targetPath: String?, val blobSha: String? = null, val newContentBase64: String? = null). sourcePath is the original tree path, targetPath is the new path (for moves/renames/uploads).

3. Create domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/TreeChangeCompiler.kt: object TreeChangeCompiler with fun compile(changes: List<PendingChange>, existingTree: List<TreeEntry>): List<TreeEntry>. Logic: MOVE/RENAME = old path entry with sha=null (delete) + new path entry with original blobSha; DELETE = entry with sha=null; CREATE_FOLDER = targetPath/.gitkeep with empty content; UPLOAD = entry at targetPath with blobSha or newContentBase64. Use PathValidation.isSafeRepoPath for all paths. Return the list of TreeEntry modifications to pass to CreateTreeRequest.

4. Create domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/RepoTreeResult.kt: sealed interface RepoTreeResult with Success(commitSha, commitUrl, summary), and Failure variants mirroring MultiFileCommitResult pattern (InvalidInput, AuthError, PermissionError, BranchNotFound, ProtectedBranch, ShaMismatch, NetworkError, UnknownError).

5. Create domain/src/main/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/RepoTreeOrchestrator.kt: class RepoTreeOrchestrator(private val gitDataApi: GithubGitDataApi). Method: suspend fun execute(owner, repo, branch, changes: List<PendingChange>): RepoTreeResult. Flow: (a) getRef(owner, repo, 'heads/$branch') to get baseSha, (b) getCommit to get baseTreeSha, (c) getTree(owner, repo, baseTreeSha, recursive=true) to get full tree, (d) compile changes via TreeChangeCompiler, (e) for entries needing new blobs (UPLOAD with newContentBase64): createBlob, (f) createTree with baseTree=baseTreeSha and compiled entries, (g) createCommit with auto-generated message, (h) updateRef with force=false and expectedSha=baseSha. Auto-generate commit message like '3 Dateien verschoben, 1 Ordner erstellt' based on change types.

6. Create domain/src/test/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/TreeChangeCompilerTest.kt: Test MOVE produces delete+add entries, RENAME produces delete+add entries, DELETE produces sha=null entry, CREATE_FOLDER produces .gitkeep entry, UPLOAD produces entry with blobSha. Test that unsafe paths are rejected.

7. Create domain/src/test/kotlin/com/painkiller/domain/github/RepoTreeOrchestratorTest.kt using the same FakeApi pattern from MultiFileCommitOrchestratorTest: test success flow (all API calls in order), test empty changes rejected, test auth error mapping, test SHA mismatch mapping, test that force=false is enforced, test auto-generated commit message.
acceptance_criteria: GithubGitDataApi interface has getTree method with owner, repo, treeSha, recursive parameters returning CreateTreeResponse
PendingChange data class exists with type enum covering MOVE, RENAME, DELETE, CREATE_FOLDER, UPLOAD
TreeChangeCompiler correctly compiles each change type into TreeEntry list
RepoTreeOrchestrator follows the getRef -> getCommit -> getTree -> compile -> createBlobs -> createTree -> createCommit -> updateRef flow
